credentials.label: Competent Person under Factory Act 1948, Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A

about.title: India’s Emerging Leader in Engineering Consultancy & Industrial Testing
paragraphs: Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL) is a Bhubaneswar-based engineering consultancy firm specialising in Non-Destructive Testing (NDT), Third Party Inspection (TPI), Structural Stability Audit, Structure Design & Drawings, and the supply of material testing instruments.

Equipped with a material testing laboratory and backed by qualified engineers, certified NDT experts, skilled laboratory technicians, and academia experts, RECPL is committed to delivering a single-window platform for precision-driven inspection and consultancy solutions across India.

We believe in an M2M policy — from Macro to Micro. From large concrete and steel structures to tiny lifting tackles, and from pressure vessels to EOT cranes, RECPL ensures every asset meets the highest standards of safety, compliance, and performance.

image.alt: RECPL engineers reviewing industrial structural details on site

services.title: Comprehensive Engineering Solutions
services.description: Engineering consultancy, industrial testing, statutory inspection, and equipment supply under one roof.

items.title: Engineering Consultancy
items.description: Expert structure design, detailed engineering drawings, and structural stability audits for industrial and commercial infrastructures.

items.title: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT)
items.description: Advanced NDT services for civil and mechanical structures, equipment, and machinery items without compromising testing quality.

items.title: Third Party Inspection (TPI)
items.description: Independent inspection and certification of lifting tools, tackles, and pressure vessels under Factory Act 1948 compliance.

items.title: Material Testing Equipment Supply
items.description: Comprehensive supply of surveying instruments, soil testing equipment, NDT devices, and laboratory testing apparatus from leading manufacturers.

reasons.title: Trusted Technical Capability With Compliance at the Core
reasons.description: Qualified people, statutory authorisation, and practical engineering support for demanding industrial assets.

items.title: Certified Expertise
items.description: ASNT NDT Level II certified professionals and Competent Persons under Factory Act 1948 Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A.

items.title: Highly Qualified Technical Team
items.description: Project leadership backed by chartered engineering credentials, a Ph.D. in Engineering, 36 published research papers, 480+ citations, and multiple patents.

items.title: End-to-End Solutions
items.description: From design and testing to inspection and equipment supply — everything under one roof.

items.title: Pan-India Reach
items.description: Headquartered in Bhubaneswar, Odisha and serving industries, factories, and projects across India.

items.title: Compliance-Driven
items.description: All inspections and audits are conducted in strict adherence to the Factory Act 1948, Indian Boiler Regulations, and relevant IS/ASME/ASTM codes.

items.title: ISO-Led Safety Culture
items.description: ISO 18001 Lead Auditor capability supporting occupational health and safety discipline across engineering programs.

industries.title: Cross-Sector Technical Support Across India
industries.description: From heavy industry to public infrastructure, RECPL supports assets that demand safety, compliance, and dependable performance.

clients.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
clients.description: RECPL has worked in association with reputed organisations across steel, energy, manufacturing, and engineering sectors.

cta.titleLead: Need an Inspection or Structural Audit?
cta.description: Get in touch with our expert team today for a free consultation and customised quotation.
